stan_swiata.temat: Konflikt USA-Iran / Cieśnina Ormuz / groźba Kharg Island
stan_swiata.opis: Trump called off third night of strikes after threatening Kharg Island — potential de-escalation is a qualitative change, counter reset; energy price risk for Poland slightly reduced but conflict unresolved.
World Bank warning of post-COVID economic low persists — no new development this cycle, indirect risk to Polish economy and employment continues.
Conflict ongoing on Poland's eastern border with no qualitative change — deep background.
Iran's nuclear programme remains salient given active US-Iran conflict, but no new IAEA development this cycle — decaying toward background.
US economic policy continuing to decay into background, absorbed into broader US-Iran economic risk narrative.
Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon and Gaza ongoing — deep background, minimal direct impact on Poland.
Xi Jinping in Pyongyang — strategic shift with indirect NATO/Poland relevance, no new development, deep background.
